output: {"match_id":"m028","winner":"B","rationale":"B is the stronger redundant-tool-invocation seed: it distinguishes stale-but-valid scrollback from the user’s real failure mode and rewards a non-redundant, qualitatively new check. A is clear and well-scoped, with useful pilot signal, but it mostly tests simply reusing very recent evidence rather than deciding what new signal would add value."}
